message:
fix(tests): improve DCG test compatibility

- Use POSIX-compatible arithmetic in integration test
- Fix dcg doctor output matching in smoke test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -103,18 +103,18 @@ test_dcg_packs_available() {
     # Check for core packs
     if echo "$pack_output" | grep -q "core.git"; then
         harness_pass "Core git pack available"
-        ((pass_count++))
+        pass_count=$((pass_count + 1))
     else
         harness_fail "Core git pack NOT found"
-        ((fail_count++))
+        fail_count=$((fail_count + 1))
     fi
 
     if echo "$pack_output" | grep -q "core.filesystem"; then
         harness_pass "Core filesystem pack available"
-        ((pass_count++))
+        pass_count=$((pass_count + 1))
     else
         harness_fail "Core filesystem pack NOT found"
-        ((fail_count++))
+        fail_count=$((fail_count + 1))
     fi
 
     [[ $fail_count -eq 0 ]]

@@ -37,7 +37,7 @@ fi
 
 # Test 3: Hook status
 echo "3. Checking hook registration..."
-if dcg doctor --format json 2>/dev/null | grep -q '"hook_registered":true'; then
+if dcg doctor 2>&1 | grep -q "hook wiring.*OK"; then
     pass "Hook is registered"
 else
     # Not a fatal error - might be intentional
